case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. RANGER INSURANCE

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE $20,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,300.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
